commercialTarget.targetContractShape: A one-month senior engineering engagement or first paid slice at or above $40k.
qualificationFocus: pain urgent enough to justify a $40k+ month of work
clear economic or technical buyer with ownership of the problem
reachable path to a real conversation through email or public company routing
specific contract-sized slice GNK can credibly own
disqualifyWhen: the likely work is too small for a $40k first month
the buyer path is unclear or only generic/no-reply channels are visible
the pain is nice-to-have rather than business-critical
the account is too broad to identify an entry point

dealTiers.targetSalesMotion: direct founder, CEO, CTO, VP Engineering, product, or operations buyer with an urgent bounded slice and low procurement drag
dealTiers.portfolioUse: primary near-term source of the first $80k-$100k/month

dealTiers.targetSalesMotion: starts as a $40k-$60k wedge, then expands into a second or third month if the first slice lands
dealTiers.portfolioUse: consistency builder after small deals create cash flow

dealTiers.targetSalesMotion: nurture only when there is a reachable team-level buyer and a specific initiative GNK can own
dealTiers.portfolioUse: upside pipeline, not the monthly survival plan

companySizeGuidance.tooSmall: companies unlikely to afford a $40k first month unless a public funding, hiring, outage, launch, or compliance signal shows urgent budget
companySizeGuidance.targetSmall: founder-led or recently funded software companies with a direct buyer and one business-critical engineering slice
companySizeGuidance.targetMedium: growth-stage software companies with named engineering, product, operations, or data leaders and visible delivery pressure
companySizeGuidance.targetLarge: upper mid-market companies only when the route is to a specific team or initiative, not generic enterprise procurement
companySizeGuidance.tooLarge: very large enterprises where cold outbound is likely to die in procurement or vendor intake without a warm path or team-specific trigger

portfolioStrategy: optimize near-term pipeline around small deals that can close quickly at or above $40k for one month
source medium deals as expansion candidates that can begin with a bounded $40k-$60k first slice
keep large opportunities in nurture unless there is a reachable specific buyer and a narrowly scoped team-level problem
prioritize two closed $40k deals per month as the minimum company cash-flow target and roughly $100k closed revenue per month for the seller's $10k commission target

agents.name: GNK Company Context
agents.role: Research the GNK site and maintain the shared truth about what GNK does.

agents.name: GNK ICP Contact Profile
agents.role: Turn GNK company context into ideal customer profiles and contact targeting guidance.

agents.name: GNK Boutique Growth Playbook
agents.role: Research how successful software boutiques and consultancies acquired clients and translate the lessons into GNK sales strategy policy.

agents.name: GNK Offer Map
agents.role: Turn GNK company and ICP context into per-segment pain, outcome, proof, and why-buy-now offer maps.

agents.name: GNK Revenue Strategy
agents.role: Turn GNK commercial targets, commission economics, and company-size constraints into deal-tier sourcing and scoring policy.

agents.name: GNK Pipeline Capacity
agents.role: Calculate required pipeline inventory, daily outbound volume, and lead-bucket refill targets from GNK revenue goals.

agents.name: GNK Account Sourcing
agents.role: Source named target accounts that match GNK ICP guidance and have a timely public trigger event.

agents.name: GNK Account Scoring
agents.role: Rank input accounts against GNK fit signals and disqualifiers, returning scored accounts with reasons and top-N recommendations.

agents.name: GNK Contact Discovery
agents.role: Find named working problem owners, evaluators, and credible routers at top accounts, avoiding unreachable executive-only targets.

agents.name: GNK Lead Persona Profile
agents.role: Research each discovered lead's individual culture, mindset, communication style, and perspective, and attach that vibe read to the lead and knowledge graph.

agents.name: GNK Client Dossier
agents.role: Combine contact discovery and offer maps into detailed account/contact notes for outbound sales.

agents.name: GNK Outreach Angle
agents.role: Produce a per-person outreach dossier with one specific opener tied to that person's trigger, role, and likely pain.

agents.name: GNK Sequence Strategy
agents.role: Design the 5-7 email outbound sequence strategy so each touch advances the conversation without becoming spam.

agents.name: GNK Email Finder
agents.role: Infer each company's email format from public evidence and produce likely email candidates for CRM leads.

agents.name: GNK Email Drafter
agents.role: Draft human-ready first-touch outreach emails from the company outreach maps, preserving grounded trigger context and a low-pressure founder tone.

agents.name: GNK Email Sequence Drafter
agents.role: Draft seven-touch per-person outbound email sequences that use the sequence strategy, account intelligence, revenue policy, and first-touch drafts.

agents.name: GNK Email Sequence Reviewer
agents.role: Self-criticize and improve the seven-touch outreach sequences using all GNK account intelligence, strategy, revenue policy, and writing rules.

agents.name: GNK Industry Map
agents.role: Enumerate every industry that fits the ICP and give a deep per-industry playbook to find companies and people (ICP -> industries -> companies -> people).

agents.name: OutageHub Industry Map
agents.role: Enumerate every industry that fits the ICP and give a deep per-industry playbook to find companies and people (ICP -> industries -> companies -> people).
agents.projectDescription: The user is building an OutageHub sales intelligence pipeline for selling Canadian power-outage API access, notification setup, and custom system integrations.

outagehub.minimumEngagementLength: monthly subscription or custom integration contract
outagehub.targetContractShape: Sell OutageHub as a $1k/month outage API, a $5k/month notification/alerting setup, or a $10k+/month custom integration wired into the customer's operational systems.
qualificationFocus: Canadian power-outage visibility affects customer support, field operations, logistics, risk, insurance, property, infrastructure, or emergency workflows
the buyer can justify at least $1k/month for reliable API access, $5k/month for notifications, or $10k+/month for system integration
there is a clear operational owner who needs outage data before customers, tenants, field teams, or internal stakeholders ask
there is a practical path to an API evaluation, notification pilot, or integration scoping call
disqualifyWhen: the account has no Canadian operational exposure or outage-sensitive workflow
outage data would be a curiosity rather than a decision input
the buyer path is only generic procurement with no operations, data, platform, support, or risk owner
the likely need is a one-off public map lookup rather than recurring API, alerting, or integration value

dealTiers.role: fast evaluation and departmental API access
dealTiers.targetSalesMotion: operations, data, product, support, risk, insurance, logistics, or infrastructure owner with a recurring need for Canadian outage data
team needs automated notifications for regions, providers, polygons, customers, properties, depots, routes, or operating areas
dealTiers.portfolioUse: preferred mid-tier deal for faster MRR growth

dealTiers.role: custom contract to wire outage intelligence into operational systems
dealTiers.targetSalesMotion: enterprise or mid-market team needs outage data inside internal dashboards, dispatch, support, risk, claims, property, or incident workflows
dealTiers.portfolioUse: highest priority strategic accounts when a real integration owner is reachable

companySizeGuidance.tooSmall: teams with no recurring Canadian operational footprint or no system that would consume outage data
companySizeGuidance.targetSmall: regional operators, SaaS products, property groups, service providers, or infrastructure-adjacent teams that can buy API access or notifications quickly
companySizeGuidance.targetMedium: Canadian or Canada-exposed companies with customer operations, field teams, claims, logistics, property, telecom, energy, insurance, or infrastructure workflows
companySizeGuidance.targetLarge: large enterprises only when a specific operations, data, platform, support, risk, or incident-management owner and integration use case is visible
companySizeGuidance.tooLarge: broad enterprises where the only route is generic vendor intake and no outage-sensitive team or workflow is identifiable

portfolioStrategy: use $1k/month API deals to create fast adoption and usage proof
prioritize $5k/month notification opportunities when the account needs automated monitoring or stakeholder alerts
source $10k+/month custom integration opportunities where outage data would feed internal systems or customer-facing workflows
keep all pricing and seller economics internal unless the prospect directly asks for pricing
